overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic corporate headquarters in Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves from a conference room through corridors into a massive multi-level atrium featuring a central illuminated tower, then explores upper office levels with glowing workstations, all rendered with cool cyan neon lighting and sleek modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate conference room transitioning to corridor

events.description: exits conference room through glass door into corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through conference room and exiting into corridor

entered.detail: long wooden conference table with scattered papers and objects
modern ergonomic office chairs arranged around the table
illuminated striped panel lights on ceiling
red fire extinguisher mounted on corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a corporate conference room with a long table and ergonomic chairs under striped ceiling lights. The camera moves forward and exits through a glass doorway into a corridor with glass walls and a visible fire extinguisher.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level corporate atrium with central tower

events.description: enters large open atrium from narrow corridor
ambient lighting shifts to cyan neon as central tower becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking into the atrium and approaching the central tower structure

entered.detail: large potted tree in atrium center
massive illuminated tower rising through the atrium center
multiple glass-railed balconies on upper floors

segments.scene_description: Moving from the narrow corridor into a vast multi-level atrium, the scene opens to reveal a central illuminated tower rising through the space. A large potted tree sits at the atrium base, and glass balconies line the upper floors. The lighting shifts to a cool cyan neon as the camera approaches the tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: atrium center looking up at illuminated tower

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full height of the tower
camera circles around the tower base while looking upward

agents.ego_description: standing in atrium looking up at the tower, rotating to view different angles

entered.detail: cyan neon light strips lining the atrium balconies

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the towering structure rising through the atrium, illuminated with golden grid patterns. Circling the base while looking up, the surrounding balconies with cyan neon lights frame the view as the tower dominates the visual field.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level office workspace with computer stations

events.description: moves from atrium balcony into enclosed office area

agents.ego_description: walking through office area examining computer workstations

entered.detail: rows of desks with multiple glowing monitors displaying data
dark metal desks with office equipment
screens glowing with cyan light showing graphs and interfaces

segments.scene_description: Moving from the atrium balcony into an enclosed office space, the scene shifts to rows of computer workstations with glowing monitors. The camera explores the area, passing desks with office equipment and glass partitions, while the atrium falls away below.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit service corridor with emergency lighting

events.description: encounters fallen body on corridor floor

agents.ego_description: proceeding through corridor passing a fallen individual on the floor

notable_agents.action: lying motionless on the floor, apparently deceased

entered.detail: motionless human figure lying on the corridor floor
red emergency exit lights on the walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dimly lit service corridor with red emergency lights. The camera passes a fallen body lying motionless on the floor to the right, then continues toward a staircase at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile corporate environment into a grand futuristic atrium before descending into a grim service area. It begins in a conference room with a long table and striped ceiling lights, moving through a glass doorway into a narrow corridor. As the camera exits the hallway, the space expands into a vast multi-level atrium where the lighting shifts to cool cyan neon, centering on a massive illuminated tower with golden grid patterns that dominates the view as the camera tilts upward. The scene then shifts from the open atrium into an enclosed office space filled with rows of glowing computer workstations and glass partitions. Finally, the camera moves away from the workstations into a dimly lit service corridor bathed in red emergency lights, passing a motionless body on the floor before heading toward a distant staircase.
